name: Tie Li
background: Mr. Tie Li has served as our director since July 2016 and our chief financial officer since May 2016. Prior to joining our company, Mr. Li served as a vice president of Autohome from September 2014 to March 2016. Prior to that, Mr. Li worked at Autohome as its financial director from 2008 to 2014. From 2002 to 2008, Mr. Li worked at PricewaterhouseCoopers Zhong Tian LLP.
